Game.Name: Shin Nihon Pro Wrestling Kounin - '95 Tokyo Dome Battle 7 (Japan)
Game.plot: Shin Nippon Pro Wrestling '95: Tokyo Dome Battle 7 is an Action game, published by Varie,which was released in Japan in 1995.Cheat: Unlock the 3 secret hidden messagesTo unlock all 3 secret messages in Shin Nippon '95: Tokyo Dome Battle 7, complete "Battle 7" mode (in either the Singles or Tag Team tournament) under Easy, Normal or Hard difficulty settings. For each level of difficulty the Battle 7 mode is completed on, a different secret message will appear during the game's closing credits. If you manage to complete the Battle 7 mode under the hardest difficulty setting, you will reveal the game's true ending.
Game.Notes: The Super Juniors invade the Super Famicom! New Japan Pro Wrestling is back and the burning spirit is stronger than ever! Pin your opponent and go for glory.
